_provenance.note: RECORDED LIVE Gemini run, one merchant per blocker (real model output, not the stub). Frozen because a live call is not recomputable; lets the demo/eval showcase real output with zero re-spend. Real public-domain business names; activation state synthetic.
honest_findings: Claims-gatekeeper passed every DECLARED claim against merchant data on all real drafts (its core function held on live output).

AUTHENTIC caught failures on real output: schema-constrained generation occasionally returns unparseable output -> the validation catches it and degrades to FAILED_TO_FALLBACK (the deterministic stub), with billed cost still recorded so the cumulative cap stays honest. The gate also holds High-risk drafts for human approval (WARN).

The first live run surfaced a fail-safe OVER-match: the pinned core guardrail flagged the phrase "business verification" regardless of tense, false-blocking a truthful imperative draft. FIXED in the agent tier (lib/agents/state-consistency.ts, tense-aware) WITHOUT touching the pinned core/differential. Confirmed here: 0 false blocks; all 4 LIVE_AI drafts score 3/3 on the eval (the 2 schema parse-failures fell back to the clean deterministic stub, also 3/3).

rows.subject: Action Required: Verify Your Business for Curbside Commons
rows.body: Hi Aaron Jevon Burrus,Your Curbside Commons account requires business verification. This is because your account has a high risk level. You have completed 0 of 5 onboarding steps. Please verify your business to continue.

rows.subject: Action Required: Upload Your Menu for Curbside Commons
rows.body:
Hello Brewvino SF,

You've completed 1 of 5 steps to get your Restaurant ready on Curbside Commons.

The next step is to upload your menu. This is needed to continue your onboarding process.

Thank you,
The Curbside Commons Team

rows.subject: Your next onboarding step with Curbside Commons
rows.body: Hi Curry In A Hurry, thanks for getting started on your Curbside Commons onboarding. Your next step is to add photos of your items. Reply to this message if you would like a hand.

rows.subject: Action Required: Set Your Business Hours
rows.body: Hi Flying Figs LLC,To help customers find your Restaurant and start placing orders, please set your business hours on Curbside Commons.You have completed 3 of 5 onboarding steps. Setting your business hours is the next action to get your business fully ready.Thanks,The Curbside Commons Team

rows.subject: Action Needed: Verify Your Bank for Curbside Commons
rows.body: Hi Iris Dullaart, Your Curbside Commons account setup requires bank verification to proceed. Until this is completed, your account has a high risk level. You have finished 4 of 5 onboarding steps. The next best action is to verify your bank. Thank you, The Curbside Commons Team
